description: List-style operations may contain a mix of successful and unsuccessful item-level results.
For mixed results, item-level statuses are authoritative for each returned item.
The top-level status describes whether the request itself was processed, not whether every item succeeded.
A response may still be top-level `ok` when the request was processed successfully but some returned items carry non-ok statuses.
Clients must inspect item-level statuses for collection operations rather than relying only on the top-level status.
Collection responses should preserve request order so clients can correlate item-level outcomes without additional matching logic.
